context: Tests whether the agent correctly initializes the Commerce.js client (package, import style, single instance, correct key usage), uses the right API methods for fetching products, handles product data fields correctly, and sanitizes HTML descriptions before rendering.

checklist.name: Correct package name
checklist.description: Uses `@chec/commerce.js` as the package name (not `commercejs`, `commerce.js`, or any other variant)

checklist.name: Default import style
checklist.description: Imports Commerce as a default import: `import Commerce from '@chec/commerce.js'` (not a named import like `import { Commerce }`)

checklist.name: Module-level client instance
checklist.description: The Commerce client is created once at module level (not inside a function, hook, or component body)

checklist.name: Public key env var
checklist.description: Uses an environment variable for the public API key (e.g. `NEXT_PUBLIC_CHEC_PUBLIC_KEY` or similar) rather than a hardcoded string

checklist.name: products.retrieve() with permalink type
checklist.description: Calls `commerce.products.retrieve(permalink, {type: 'permalink'})` to fetch a single product by its slug/permalink

checklist.name: Optional image access
checklist.description: Accesses the product image URL with optional chaining (`product.image?.url`) or includes a null check before accessing

checklist.name: DOMPurify for HTML sanitization
checklist.description: Uses DOMPurify (specifically `isomorphic-dompurify`) to sanitize product description HTML before rendering it

checklist.name: dangerouslySetInnerHTML after sanitization
checklist.description: Renders the sanitized description with `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` (not as raw text, and NOT without sanitizing first)

checklist.name: Public key not secret key
checklist.description: Client-side code uses the public key (NOT the secret key); no usage of `CHEC_SECRET_KEY` in browser/component code
